text:
Satya Keerthi Dara 
Cape Girardeau, Missouri 
940-277-9720 
satyakeerthidara7@gmail.com 
March 24, 2026 
Dear Hiring Manager, 
I am applying for the Data / AI Engineer position. I have 1.5+ years of experience building 
data pipelines, backend APIs, and AI-driven systems using Python, SQL, and Java. 
At SAK Informatics, I built a user activity analytics platform that processed large 
volumes of event data and delivered real-time insights through dashboards. I designed 
data pipelines, integrated APIs, and improved reporting speed and system visibility. This 
helped teams make faster, data-driven decisions. 
In addition, I have experience building AI-based systems using LLMs. I developed an AI 
job matching platform that analyzes resumes and matches them with job descriptions 
using NLP and RAG pipelines. This strengthened my ability to connect data engineering 
with real-world AI applications. 
I am interested in this role because it focuses on building scalable systems and 
applying data-driven solutions to real-world problems. 
I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to your team. Thank you for your time 
and consideration. 
Sincerely, 
Satya Keerthi Dara
